name: Maren Solvig
public_goal: Conduct a compliance audit of Stillwell Hydro following anonymous safety complaints filed with the regulatory board.
private_goal: Find out what actually happened to her younger brother Tomas, who took a maintenance job at Stillwell Hydro eight months ago and stopped writing home four months in.
secrets: Her audit authorization is forged. Her real credentials were suspended after she was blamed for falsifying an inspection report at her last posting -- a report she insists was altered after she filed it, though she's never been able to prove that.
She found one of Tomas's work chits still in the facility's check-in log, dated three weeks after his personnel file says he was transferred out.
personality: Procedural and guarded. Uses paperwork and protocol as armor -- if she can frame something as a rule, she doesn't have to admit it's personal. Softens only when the professional distance stops working.
inventory: an expired but genuine inspector's seal, kept rather than surrendered
